name: memweave
description: Local-first, tiered memory for OpenAI Codex agents. Injects relevant long-term memories into the system prompt at UserPromptSubmit, queues file_pack memories on file-touching tool calls (PreToolUse), and writes completed turns back to the MemWeave server on Stop, so high-signal facts are consolidated into durable memory across sessions.

interface.longDescription: MemWeave gives your Codex agent a long-term memory. The plugin auto-exposes 10 memory_* MCP tools (save, recall, search, expand, etc.), injects relevant memories into the system prompt on UserPromptSubmit and file-touching tool calls, and writes completed turns back to the local server on Stop, so high-signal facts are consolidated into durable memory across sessions.
